Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I can't sense it anymore! Nice work, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}He's back at the dorm, but something felt off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The chairman's there too, so he should be okay, but... we should hurry back, just in case.[n]{f 1 1}
